description: Find the contact email on a simple website
instructions: Navigate to https://example.com and find the contact email address. Return just the email address.

description: Find the top story title on Hacker News
instructions: Go to Hacker News front page and extract the title of the first/top story. Return only the title text.

description: Count the repositories in a GitHub search
instructions: Search GitHub for 'web scraping' and count how many repositories are returned. Return the count number.
